calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust And Interested Persons' Ownership In Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gillian Ayres Jones for Harriet Newhart (Trustee).

The Court informed Counsel that it can not amend the San Mateo County Court distribution order, that it is not appropriate to find the property is in joint tenancy and that several of the findings in the order are not appropriate to make. The Court also asked why the property is in the Trust when the San Mateo Court order distributed it to the Estate. Ms. Jones spoke of the different deeds that were executed and dates, explained the relationship of Amelia, Henry and Sam, and stated that the Schembris all received notice and have not objected. The Court stated that it has no problem with the conclusion but that it has an issue with the findings. Ms. Jones stated that she will submit a revised order. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust and Interested Person's Ownership in Real Property was taken under submission (subject to receipt of a revised order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
